Mua Lee (ມົວລີ) — Frontend & Full-Stack Web Developer | Luang Prabang, Laos

Mua Lee (mualee, Mualee, ມົວລີ, ມົວ ລີ, ssmilaos) is a frontend and full-stack web developer from Luang Prabang, Laos at SSMI Laos. Building modern web applications with React, TypeScript, and web technologies. Explore skills, projects & work at mualee.com.

MuaLee About Skills Projects Contact

Building Modern Web Applications with Cutting-Edge Technologies

I'm Mua Lee, a frontend developer and full-stack web developer from Luang Prabang, Laos. I build accessible, responsive, and performant web applications with modern web technologies.

About Mua Lee — Full-Stack Web Developer

Get to know me and my work as a developer in Luang Prabang, Laos

I'm a passionate full-stack developer with over 3 years of experience building web applications. I specialize in JavaScript, React, Node.js, and modern web technologies.

My journey in web development started when I was in college, where I built my first website. Since then, I've worked with startups and established companies to create intuitive and performant digital experiences.

Web Development Skills & Technologies

Frontend: HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS

Backend: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, GraphQL

Other: Git/GitHub, Docker, AWS, UI/UX Design, Testing

Tech Stack: Vite, React, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, React Query, Shadcn UI, TypeScript

Web Development Projects & Work

E-commerce Platform — A full-featured e-commerce platform with payment integration, user authentication, and admin dashboard. Technologies: React, Node.js, MongoDB, Stripe

Portfolio Website — A responsive portfolio website built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Technologies: Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion

Task Management App — A task management application with drag-and-drop functionality and team collaboration features. Technologies: React, Firebase, Tailwind CSS

Weather Dashboard — A weather dashboard that displays current and forecasted weather data from multiple APIs. Technologies: JavaScript, APIs, CSS

Blog API — A RESTful API for a blog platform with authentication, authorization, and CRUD operations. Technologies: Node.js, Express, MongoDB

Chat Application — Real-time chat application with private messaging and group chat functionality. Technologies: React, Socket.io, Node.js
